category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts between UTF-8 and ASCII flavors; official homepage describes conversion between UTF-8 Unicode and more than thirty 7-bit ASCII equivalents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is uni2ascii; official homepage title is uni2ascii and also documents ascii2uni.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section linking standard Unix manual pages for uni2ascii and ascii2uni.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides release downloads and manual pages but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe bidirectional conversion between UTF-8 Unicode and ASCII escape/entity formats.
